title: RunDialog VI
description:
Runs an Epson RC+ 8.0 dialog.

Inputs

Spel Ref
		 In	Spel reference from a previous Spel
		 Ref Out.

Error In	Error condition from a previous Spel
		 node.

Dialog
				 name	ID	Description

RobotManager	1	ID for Tools | Robot Manager
				 dialog

ControllerTools	2	ID for Tools | Controller
				 dialog

ID for Tools | Controller
				 dialog

Outputs

Spel Ref
		 Out	Spel reference output for next VI to
		 use.

Error Out	Error condition output for subsequent
		 Spel nodes.

RunDialog Example
